title: myosotidium hortensia
intro: Myosotidium hortensia, also known as the New Zealand forget-me-not, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Myosotidium hortensia include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, which makes it useful in treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant's health benefits also include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health due to its flavonoid and alkaloid content. Myosotidium hortensia can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or topical cream to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
